productDisplayName: Puma Men White Evo Leather Shoes
description: Style Note The simple design and durable construction of these puma shoes in leather are typical of the brands minimalistic designs. The leather upper provides instant style and durability, cushioned midsoles give comfort and stability and rubber outsoles guarantee maximum traction. Perfect for urban life.Product Details Round blunt white, mid top shoe with stitched detailing and black lace Mesh padded interiors with mesh padded tongue Overlay at the heel collar Form stripes on the sides of the upper Branding at the back PU midsole for better shock absorption TPU outsole with concentric grooves for better grip and pivot points in the heel and big toe region nbsp;Material and Care Leather, synthetic Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner and leather brush to restore shine Do not store in direct sunlightWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
